title: Pourers and Casters, Metal
description: Operate hand-controlled mechanisms to pour and regulate the flow of molten metal into molds to produce castings or ingots.

tasks.text: Pour and regulate the flow of molten metal into molds and forms to produce ingots or other castings, using ladles or hand-controlled mechanisms.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Read temperature gauges and observe color changes, adjusting furnace flames, torches, or electrical heating units as necessary to melt metal to specifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remove solidified steel or slag from pouring nozzles, using long bars or oxygen burners.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Examine molds to ensure they are clean, smooth, and properly coated.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Collect samples, or signal workers to sample metal for analysis.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Load specified amounts of metal and flux into furnaces or clay crucibles.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Position equipment such as ladles, grinding wheels, pouring nozzles, or crucibles, or signal other workers to position equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Skim slag or remove excess metal from ingots or equipment, using hand tools, strainers, rakes, or burners, collecting scrap for recycling.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Transport metal ingots to storage areas, using forklifts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assemble and embed cores in casting frames, using hand tools and equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Turn valves to circulate water through cores, or spray water on filled molds to cool and solidify metal.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Pull levers to lift ladle stoppers and to allow molten steel to flow into ingot molds to specified heights.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remove metal ingots or cores from molds, using hand tools, cranes, and chain hoists.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Repair and maintain metal forms and equipment, using hand tools, sledges, and bars.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Add metal to molds to compensate for shrinkage.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Stencil identifying information on ingots and pigs, using special hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
